name: RSNA 2026
fullName: Radiological Society of North America
requirements: Max 2,000 characters. 1 table or 1 figure allowed. Must be submitted in English.

name: SfN Neuroscience 2026
fullName: Society for Neuroscience Annual Meeting
requirements: Sponsoring member required. $155 submission fee. Max 2,300 characters.

name: ESMO Congress 2026
fullName: European Society for Medical Oncology
requirements: Background, Methods, Results, Conclusions format. Max 2,000 characters (excluding spaces).

name: DDW 2026
fullName: Digestive Disease Week
requirements: Submission fee required ($80). Maximum of 2,900 characters.

name: EULAR 2026
fullName: European Alliance of Associations for Rheumatology
requirements: Must not have been previously published. Max 3,600 characters.

name: BIO International 2026
fullName: BIO International Convention
requirements: Industry/startup focus. Requires a 500-word executive summary.

name: AUA 2026
fullName: American Urological Association Annual Meeting
requirements: 2,280 character limit including spaces. 1 graphic allowed.

name: AACR Annual Meeting 2026
fullName: American Association for Cancer Research
requirements: Must be sponsored by an AACR member. 2,600 character limit.

name: ASCO 2026
fullName: American Society of Clinical Oncology Annual Meeting
requirements: First author must be a member or sponsored. Late-breaking deadline: March 9.

name: ASH 2026
fullName: American Society of Hematology
requirements: $85 submission fee. Max 3,800 characters (includes spaces).

name: AHA Scientific Sessions 2026
fullName: American Heart Association
requirements: Max 1,950 characters (spaces do not count). 1 image allowed.

name: ACC.26
fullName: American College of Cardiology
requirements: Abstracts must be structured (Background, Methods, Results, Conclusion).

name: ESC Congress 2026
fullName: European Society of Cardiology
requirements: No fee for submission. Max 3,000 characters.

name: AAN 2026
fullName: American Academy of Neurology
requirements: Max 250 words. Only 1 data table allowed.

name: IDWeek 2026
fullName: Infectious Diseases Society of America
requirements: Max 1,950 characters. References are not included in the limit.

name: ECCMID 2026 (ESCMID Global)
fullName: European Society of Clinical Microbiology and Infectious Diseases
requirements: Abstract must not be previously published. 250 word limit.

name: CROI 2026
fullName: Conference on Retroviruses and Opportunistic Infections
requirements: Max 2,500 characters. No tables or figures allowed in initial abstract submission.

name: ENDO 2026
fullName: Endocrine Society Annual Meeting
requirements: Limit 2,500 characters. Sponsoring member NOT required.

name: ADA 2026
fullName: American Diabetes Association Scientific Sessions
requirements: Strict 250 word limit. Tables and figures are strictly prohibited in abstracts.

name: EASD 2026
fullName: European Association for the Study of Diabetes
requirements: Max 3,200 characters including spaces. One table or figure permitted.

name: ATS 2026
fullName: American Thoracic Society International Conference
requirements: $80 fee. Late-breaking deadline: January 28, 2026.

name: CHEST 2026
fullName: American College of Chest Physicians
requirements: Max 250 words. Must use: INTRODUCTION, METHODS, RESULTS, CONCLUSIONS.

name: ACR Convergence 2026
fullName: American College of Rheumatology
requirements: Max 2,750 characters (excluding spaces). 2 graphics allowed.

name: ASN Kidney Week 2026
fullName: American Society of Nephrology
requirements: Max 2,500 characters. Sponsoring member required if first author is not a member.

name: AAI IMMUNOLOGY 2026
fullName: American Association of Immunologists
requirements: Max 1,500 characters. Member submission fee is lower than non-member.

name: SITC 2026
fullName: Society for Immunotherapy of Cancer
requirements: SITC membership highly encouraged. Trial in progress abstracts accepted.

name: ASHG 2026
fullName: American Society of Human Genetics
requirements: Max 2,500 characters. $50 submission fee. No tables/figures allowed.

name: ASCB | EMBO 2026
fullName: American Society for Cell Biology
requirements: Max 3,000 characters. No tables or figures in abstract text.

name: BPS 2026
fullName: Biophysical Society Annual Meeting
requirements: Max 3,000 characters (including spaces). First author must present.

name: BMES 2026
fullName: Biomedical Engineering Society
requirements: 1 page maximum. Must include Introduction, Materials/Methods, Results/Discussion, Conclusion.

name: IEEE EMBC 2026
fullName: IEEE Engineering in Medicine and Biology
requirements: 1-page research highlights or 4-page full contributed papers accepted.

name: SLAS 2026
fullName: Society for Laboratory Automation and Screening
requirements: Must align with track topics. Commercial/promotional abstracts will be rejected.

requirements: Poster pitches available. Focus should be on translational synbio/biotech.

requirements: Max 600 words. Must disclose all financial conflicts of interest.

requirements: Max 850 words. Strict formatting templates must be used.

requirements: Max 300 words. No charts, tables, or graphs allowed.

requirements: Limited to 450 words. Up to 2 images/tables allowed.

requirements: Max 300 words. Must use standardized APA template.

requirements: Max 250 words. Only 1 submission allowed per primary author.

requirements: Max 2,500 characters. Must use specific font and formatting templates.

requirements: Max 300 words. Tables permitted but count towards word limit.

name: AAPM 2026
fullName: American Association of Physicists in Medicine Annual Meeting
requirements: Max 2,500 characters. Submission fee ~$50. Undergrad and grad presenters welcome.

name: ESTRO 2026
fullName: European Society for Radiotherapy and Oncology Annual Congress
requirements: Max 3,000 characters. European counterpart to ASTRO — strong on physics and biology.

name: PTCOG 2026
fullName: Particle Therapy Co-operative Group Annual Conference
requirements: Focused on proton, carbon ion, and particle therapies. Strong physics track. Max 300 words.

name: SNO 2026
fullName: Society for Neuro-Oncology Annual Meeting
requirements: Max 400 words. Covers GBM, CNS lymphoma, pediatric brain tumors, and neuro-oncology imaging.

name: SSO 2027
fullName: Society of Surgical Oncology Annual Meeting
requirements: Max 300 words. Case reports not accepted. Clinical and translational tracks available.

name: ABRCMS 2026
fullName: Annual Biomedical Research Conference for Minoritized Scientists
requirements: Undergrad and grad presenters. Must be enrolled in a degree program. One of the best undergrad research conferences in biomedicine — highly recommended.
notes: Undergrad-friendly. Travel awards available. Strong networking with PhD programs and MD/PhD recruiters.

name: SACNAS 2026
fullName: Society for Advancement of Chicanos/Hispanics and Native Americans in Science
requirements: Open to all. Max 250 words. Poster and oral presentation tracks. Strong undergrad presence and grad school fair.
notes: One of the largest diversity STEM conferences. Excellent for networking, grad school recruitment, and finding mentors.

name: ASBMB 2026
fullName: American Society for Biochemistry and Molecular Biology Annual Meeting
requirements: Max 2,500 characters. Undergraduate poster competition available. $35 submission fee for non-members.
notes: Strong undergrad track with dedicated poster session and travel awards. Great for wet lab researchers.

name: RNA Society 2026
fullName: RNA Society Annual Meeting
requirements: Max 300 words. Covers RNA biology, splicing, non-coding RNA, CRISPR, and RNA therapeutics.

name: ACG 2026
fullName: American College of Gastroenterology Annual Scientific Meeting
requirements: Max 300 words. Student/resident abstract competition available. Structured format required.

name: AAOS 2027
fullName: American Academy of Orthopaedic Surgeons Annual Meeting
requirements: Max 300 words. Abstracts must include hypothesis, methods, results, and conclusion.

name: Gordon Research Conferences — Cancer
fullName: Gordon Research Conferences (Cancer-related tracks)
requirements: Application-based, not standard abstract submission. Highly selective and prestigious. Poster presentations for grad students and postdocs.
notes: Multiple cancer-related GRCs run throughout summer. Each has its own deadline. Check the website for the specific track (e.g., Radiation, Tumor Immunology, Metastasis).

name: Keystone Symposia 2026
fullName: Keystone Symposia on Molecular and Cellular Biology
requirements: Scholarship applications available. Abstracts reviewed for poster/short talk selection. Rolling deadlines by topic.
notes: Multiple symposia throughout the year on focused topics (e.g., DNA repair, cancer metabolism, immunotherapy). Check website for the specific meeting relevant to your research.

name: ACRP 2027
fullName: Association of Clinical Research Professionals Global Conference
requirements: Focuses on clinical trial design, site management, regulatory affairs, and patient recruitment. Max 300 words.

name: AACR Special Conferences 2026
fullName: American Association for Cancer Research Special Conferences
requirements: More focused and accessible than the Annual Meeting. Topics change yearly (e.g., Tumor Immunology, DNA Damage, Liquid Biopsy). Check website for specific conference deadlines.
notes: Smaller, topic-specific meetings. Great for grad students and undergrads with focused research. Often easier to get accepted than the main AACR Annual Meeting.
